title: FUND ADMINISTRATIVE EXECUTIVE
description:
1. Prepare and issue accurate invoices monthly for client maintenance, projects, adhocs services, and other billable activities to ensure timely collection;

2. Prepare and send Statement of Accounts to Clients;

3. Track accounts receivable and payable, and proactively pursue overdue payments to optimize cash flow;

4. Execute daily accounting operations including data entry and transaction processing to maintain up-to-date financial records

5. Manage invoice preparation through vendor portals to streamline billing processes;

6. Ensure accuracy and reliability of accounting data and transaction in QuickBooks;

7. Support accounting audits by preparing required documentation and responding to audit inquiries

8. Administer general office and accounting support functions to facilitate smooth departmental operations

9. Prepare payment voucher, reimbursement claim and petty cash;

10. Overseeing administrative functions, such as managing office supplies, maintaining records, and handling communication;

11. Issue Purchase Order and coordinate with suppliers regarding the delivery requirements;

12. Handle supplier’s bills for the delivery orders;

13. Ensure supplier’s compliance on the specific standards and delivery management;

14. Responsible to all Adhoc duties requirement from Admin & Account’s Department;

15. Report to Director and submit monthly reports and other required documents;

16. Prepare and submit GST;

17. Assist in applying government grants and any government funding (as necessary);

18. Coordinate vehicle handovers and manage season parking arrangements to support company logistics

19. Tracking daily expenses;

20. Arrange vehicle insurances and other insurance related matters;

21. Monitoring in one motoring website for Vehicle need to Renew Road tax and inspection;

22. Carry out additional tasks as assigned by management periodically.

Requirements :

Candidate must possess at least Bachelors Degree in Business Management or equivalent.

Able to work under pressure and work beyond normal working hours and on weekends/public holidays if required. Able to work Monday's to Saturday's.

Positive and independent individual with good interpersonal, communication and organizational skill.

Hard working meticulous and able to work independently.

postedCompany.description:
Golden Landscape & Construction Pte Ltd (GLC) is an integrated company and started its business in 2012 solely as a landscaping company that offers great value of money through landscape services and minor construction. The company’s owner set up the business as a natural progression from his family’s traditional involvement in agriculture.

The management are expert with strategic planning in landscape projects and impressive background in horticultural services. The company aims to achieve and progress better landscaping services with the collaboration of well-known landscape and construction companies in Singapore. GLC also aiming for re-structuring landscape into a brilliant nature like gold by re-incarnating and deepens nature through landscaping.

GLC encourages employees to be constituent of growths and perseverance to venture better Singapore in the future. We are looking for more landscape maintenances, projects and provide better and competitive services. Customer’s fulfilment and satisfaction are our aspiration of success and development.
postedCompany.name: GOLDEN LANDSCAPE & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.
